suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Replace the commander.js/yargs parser instruction with the repository's current hand-rolled parser pattern in `apps/cli/src/cli.ts`.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `fix-cli-sync-local-default` rerun again observed `.factory/skills/cli-worker/SKILL.md:62` telling workers to use commander.js or yargs, while `.factory/library/architecture.md:64` and the current fix both use the hand-rolled parser in `apps/cli/src/cli.ts`.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify the required manual-verification policy and require workers to report `followedProcedure: false` with deviations whenever the mandated CLI manual checks are skipped.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `fix-cli-sync-local-default` handoff recorded only automated validators (`npm test -- --filter @codex-fleet/cli`, `npm run typecheck`, `npm run lint`) while `.factory/skills/cli-worker/SKILL.md:81-92` still labels manual CLI verification as required, yet `skillFeedback.followedProcedure` remained true.
